name: daily_ingest_pipeline
description: Daily data ingestion pipeline — pulls from APIs and databases, validates, and loads to warehouse.

tasks.name: fetch_api_events
tasks.description: Pull event data from the product analytics API.

tasks.name: fetch_payments_db
tasks.description: Extract payment records from the payments Postgres database.
tasks.taskSQL: SELECT * FROM payments.transactions WHERE created_at >= '{{ ds }}'

tasks.name: fetch_crm_export
tasks.description: Download the daily CRM CSV export from SFTP.

tasks.name: validate_events
tasks.description: Run data quality checks on event data — schema validation, null checks, deduplication.

tasks.name: validate_payments
tasks.description: Validate payment records — check for missing amounts, invalid currencies, orphan transactions.

tasks.name: validate_crm
tasks.description: Validate CRM export — check for required fields, email format, duplicate contacts.

tasks.name: load_to_warehouse
tasks.description: Merge validated data into the analytics warehouse.
tasks.taskSQL: MERGE INTO warehouse.analytics.daily_ingest USING staging.validated_data ON (id = id) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT

tasks.name: notify_team
tasks.description: Send Slack notification with ingest summary.
